title: Leaked Document Shows the Surveillance Tech at ICE’s Fingertips
excerpt: From phone location data, to social media monitoring, to online undercover tools, a document obtained by 404 Media lays out the surveillance tech available across ICE agency wide.
content_html:

•

ICE

· Jul 23, 2026 at 9:55 AM

From phone location data, to social media monitoring, to online undercover tools, a document obtained by 404 Media lays out the surveillance tech available across ICE agency wide.
